svg.text: LithePG — v1.1 backlog: EXPLAIN plan parser (QueryPlan)
$ swift test --filter QueryPlan
✔ parses a plain single-node EXPLAIN plan
✔ parses a nested ANALYZE plan tree with timing
✔ renders an indented text outline of the plan tree
✔ renders a nested indented text outline
✔ identifies the most expensive node by total cost
✔ throws invalidJSON for malformed input
✔ throws missingPlan when no Plan node is present
✔ outline output never contains password-like connection secrets
✔ Test run with 8 tests in 1 suite passed
✔ Full suite: 164 tests in 24 suites passed (was 156/23) — no regressions
Example: QueryPlan.parse(explainJSON:).outline for a hash join —
Hash Join (cost=1.50..45.20 rows=200)
-> Seq Scan on orders (cost=0.00..30.00 rows=500)
-> Seq Scan on customers (cost=0.00..10.00 rows=200)
nodeCount=4 · analyzed=true · costliestNode=Hash Join (45.20)
Pure on-device parser · no network / no SQL execution / no credentials · outline derived only from plan fields
2026-07-02 · Sources/LithePGCore/QueryPlan.swift + Tests/LithePGCoreTests/QueryPlanTests.swift
